Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Edward Cullen, (408)288-3860 for Defendant/Opposing party Betty Lee.

Not argured. PLAINTIFFS NICHOLAS EDMUNDS and SHELLEY ALINGAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement is DENIED, moot. Request for attorney's fees is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: A. James Robertson II Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
